pi_items.source: Verified by task_utils.sh which explicitly injects workorderid 1002 with the title "Email account not working - cannot send or receive emails" via SQL.
Verified by task_utils.sh which explicitly injects workorderid 1005 with the title "Need Adobe Acrobat Pro installed for contract review" via SQL.
Verified by export_result.sh checking for "smtp" (case-insensitive) in the resolution text of ticket 1002.
Verified by export_result.sh checking for "acrobat" (case-insensitive) in the resolution text of ticket 1005.
Verified by export_result.sh querying LOWER(title) LIKE "%smtp%" for the created knowledge base article.

pi_items.metadata_value: Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows
pi_items.verified_value: Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows
pi_items.source: Verified from the task description which explicitly states to create a KB article titled "Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows".

privileged_info_summary: The environment's ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus instance is synthetically populated via direct PostgreSQL injections in task_utils.sh. It explicitly assigns ticket ID 1002 to the email failure issue and ticket ID 1005 to the Adobe Acrobat installation request. The export scripts verify resolution text by matching keywords like "smtp" for ticket 1002 and "acrobat" for ticket 1005, and search for "smtp" in the newly generated Knowledge Base article's title to evaluate task success.
